reviews.review_description: I feel like the developer made the bending movement specifically for their body so it’s hard harder for anyone else without a similar body to them to be able to do it properly. The bending is really hard specifically earth bending, and a few moves in the other move sets. This game is amazing. It’s probably the best bending VR game I’ve played, but it’s just so hard to enjoy when you can’t play properly.  So constructive criticism to the developer add videos so that you can see exactly what to do in order to do each bending move. But other than that, this game is amazing. I wish more people were playing so I can get into online games. ￼

developer_response.body: That's a valid concern and you are completely correct. The bending poses do not change depending on body type, so that's my bad. Since I will not be updating this game further, I recommend Rumble or Elements Divided as 2 really good bending games.

reviews.review_description: Whenever I try to do earth bending I can only do the disc lifting part and nothing else and everything else is fine it’s just earth bending.

developer_response.body: Are you using the pose teacher and doing the exact pose? Click on the pose images to bring up a ghost pose and copy that

reviews.review_description: I encourage you to work on another project i know you probably have spent alot of time making this game but I hate too break it too you but elements divided will Rule this category unless you make sum drastic and time consuming changes  but this is my opinion you do you God bless: Edit oh ok then just keep having fun 😁

developer_response.body: you're probably right but I'm just making this for fun mostly.

reviews.review_description:
Earth: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Good defense with earth wall + good movement and decent offense

Water: ⭐️⭐️⭐️
Good offense, ice spikes in particular do a lot of damage, but no movement and basically no defense.

Air: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Great movement, high knockback, just low damage. 5 stars for arenas where you can be knocked off. 

Fire: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Overall well balanced but could use some more moves and doesn’t have great defense. Good movement though.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback. We have buffed water and added movement abilities and more offensive moves.

reviews.review_description:
I love this game! So so fun with amazing mechanics, I just wish the community was more active!
Absolute 10/10 all round, please continue to work on this wonderful game!
The thing that shows u how to do a move doesnt work so with fire and earth u cant do anything.  :edit: it works but earth wall summon doesnt work

developer_response.body: It's hard to tell but the final pose for earth wall summon actually has the arms crossed in an X shape. I'll be updating the move teacher to show a full body so it's easier to tell.

reviews.review_description: No on was on so couldent play against any one.

developer_response.body: Unfortunately the player base at the moment is pretty small. You can try joining our discord and asking for fights: https://discord.gg/sCBdwHX8dk
